LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOSEPH BETZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PERMIT PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE THE TERMS OF THE ORAL CONTRACT IN THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION AND TO DELETE JOHNSTON AS A PARTY TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION OR TO PLEAD FACTS GIVING RISE TO A MECHANICS LIEN CLAIM BY HER. IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Molly Johnston (673.3021) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained as to the first cause of action with leave to amend for plaintiff to attach the written contract. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
